title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.346 - Uterine Fibroid Awareness Month designated for month of July
text:
9.346.  Uterine Fibroid Awareness Month designated for month of July. — The month of July is hereby designated as "Uterine Fibroid Awareness Month" in Missouri.  Citizens of this state are encouraged to wear white on July first and participate in appropriate events and activities to raise awareness about uterine fibroids, benign tumors that grow in the uterus and cause pain, heavy bleeding, and reproductive problems.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738)
